events.label: LAUNCH
events.note: Falcon Heavy lifts off. Free-return — no landing.

events.label: TMI BURN
events.note: Trans-Mars Injection: 3.61 km/s. Escape velocity achieved.

events.label: DAY 1 CHECK
events.note: First systems health check complete. All nominal.

events.label: COMMS GLITCH
events.note: Brief X-band signal dropout (8 s). DSN reacquired. Cause: thruster plume occlusion. No data lost.

events.label: MARS FLYBY
events.note: Closest approach: ~300 km altitude. Gravity assist initiates return.

events.label: RETURN TRAJECTORY
events.note: Free-return gravity assist complete. Spacecraft on Earth trajectory.
